injuries: Jordan Henderson (England) — ruled out for the remainder of the tournament with a broken wrist
Declan Rice (England) — carrying a hamstring/lower-back issue and was ill, substituted at half-time in the quarter-final; expected available
Ezri Konsa (England) — hamstring cramp late vs Norway, expected to retain his place
Lionel Messi (Argentina) — cut above right eye from a Granit Xhaka challenge, swelling risk but expected to play
Cristian Romero (Argentina) — recovered from a knee injury in time for the tournament, expected available
suspensions: Jarell Quansah (England) — serving the second match of a two-game ban for a red card vs Mexico
lineupHints: England predicted XI: Pickford; James, Konsa, Guehi, O'Reilly; Anderson, Rice; Saka, Bellingham, Gordon; Kane
motivationFlags: World Cup semi-final — winner reaches the final
